    P

    PASS - Enum constant in enum class whistapp.domain.bids.BidType
     
    playCard(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.cards.Hand
    A method that plays a card from this hand.
    playCard(String, Suit) - Method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A method for playing a given card.
    playCardFromCurrentPlayerHand(String, ArrayList) - Method in class whistapp.domain.Trick
    A method for playing a card from the current player's hand.
    Player - Class in whistapp.domain.players
    Represents a player in the game of Whist.
    Player(String) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A basic constructor for a player.
    playerNameValid(String) - Static method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A simple helper method for checking if an individual player name is valid.
    players - Variable in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
     
    playersValid(ArrayList) - Static method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for checking if the players are valid.
    playersValid(ArrayList) - Static method in class whistapp.domain.players.Player
    A method for checking if the players are valid.
    PlayGame - Class in whistapp.domain.game
     
    PlayGame() - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A no-arg constructor for the PlayGame class.
    PlayGame(LinkedHashMap) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A constructor for creating a new game of PlayWhist.
    PlayGameCLI - Class in whistapp.ui
    CLI for playing a virtual game of Whist.
    PlayGameCLI(Controller) - Constructor for class whistapp.ui.PlayGameCLI
    Create a PlayGameCLI bound to the given controller.
    PlayRound - Class in whistapp.domain.round
     
    PlayRound(ArrayList) - Constructor for class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A constructor for the PlayRound class.
    printSeparator() - Static method in class whistapp.ui.CLI
    Prints a decorative separator line for better readability in the terminal.
    proceedAutonomousBid() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Commands the game to proceed with an autonomous bid.
    proceedAutonomousBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for processing an autonomous bid.
    proceedAutonomousBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A method starting an autonomous bid in the current round.
    proceedAutonomousBid() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for processing the bid of an autonomous player.
    proceedAutonomousCardPlay() - Method in class whistapp.application.Controller
    Commands the game to proceed with an autonomous card play.
    processAutonomousCardPlay() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for processing an autonomous card play.
    processAutonomousCardPlay() - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A method for processing an autonomous card play.
    processAutonomousCardPlay() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for processing the autonomous playing of a card in the current trick.
    processCardPlay(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.Game
    A method for processing a given card as the card played by the current player.
    processCardPlay(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.game.PlayGame
    A method for processing a given card as the card played by the current player of the current round.
    processCardPlay(String) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for processing the playing of a given card by the current player in the current trick.
    processRoundOutcome() - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
    A method for processing the outcome of this round.
    processRoundOutcome(HashMap) - Method in class whistapp.domain.round.Round
    A method for processing the outcome of the round according to the number of tricks won per player.
    Proposal - Class in whistapp.domain.bids
    Represents a Proposal bid (8 tricks with a specified suit)

    ProposalAlone - Class in whistapp.domain.bids
    Represents a proposal to play alone in the game of Whist.

    ProposalWithPartner - Class in whistapp.domain.bids
    Represents a proposal to play with a partner in the game of Whist.
